languages.text: "Может быть, твой вид все же способен однажды научиться жить в гармонии с порабощенными им мирами".
"Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."
languages.original_text: "Может быть, твой вид все же способен однажды научиться жить в гармонии с порабощенными им мирами".

traits.locale_text: "Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."
"Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."
"Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."

languages.text: 「もしかしたら、あなたの種族はいつか、征服した世界と調和して生きることを学ぶかもしれません」
languages.original_text: "Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."

traits.locale_text: 「もしかしたら、あなたの種族はいつか、征服した世界と調和して生きることを学ぶかもしれません。」

languages.text: «Tal vez tu pueblo llegue a aprender a vivir en armonía con los mundos que ha subyugado».
languages.original_text: "Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."

traits.locale_text: «Tal vez tu pueblo llegue a aprender a vivir en armonía con los mundos que ha subyugado».

languages.text: “或许终有一天，你的族类也能学会与被征服的世界和谐共存。”
languages.original_text: "Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."

traits.locale_text: “或许终有一天，你的族类也能学会与被征服的世界和谐共存。”

languages.text: "Vielleicht lernt Eure Spezies eines Tages ja doch noch, mit den von ihr unterworfenen Welten in Harmonie zu leben."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."

traits.locale_text: "Vielleicht lernt Eure Spezies eines Tages ja doch noch, mit den von ihr unterworfenen Welten in Harmonie zu leben."

languages.text: "Belki de bir gün türünüz, boyun eğdirdiği dünyalarla uyum içinde yaşamayı öğrenebilir."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."

traits.locale_text: "Belki de bir gün türünüz, boyun eğdirdiği dünyalarla uyum içinde yaşamayı öğrenebilir."

languages.text: « Un jour, les vôtres apprendront peut-être à vivre en harmonie avec les mondes qu'ils ont assujettis. »
languages.original_text: "Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."

traits.locale_text: « Un jour, les vôtres apprendront peut-être à vivre en harmonie avec les mondes qu'ils ont assujettis. »
